steps.title: Compare Green's opinions
steps.content: Green found the 2016 version very confusing but praised the 2019 Broadway version enthusiastically. This contrast means his view of storytelling changed substantially.

steps.title: Reject choices that misread the contrast
steps.content: Choice A says the 2016 production had fewer problems than 2019, which reverses the evidence. Choice B mentions stage size, which the text never links to Green's evaluation. Choice C says the 2019 version was less enjoyable, which conflicts with praise. The correct inference is strong improvement from 2016 to Broadway. The answer is D.
